---
title: "Passing Thoughts on Religion. By the author of “Amy Herbert”"
---

## Passing Thoughts on Religion. By the author of “Amy Herbert”

**Author:** Elizabeth Missing Sewell
**Date:** 1860
**Imprint:** London: Longman

### Notes

See also [[person:1301]Elizabeth Sewell].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
